title: Air Traffic Controller
description: Directs aircraft movements in Navy airspace, providing guidance for takeoff, landing, and in-flight operations aboard carriers and at naval air stations.

title: Aviation Machinist's Mate
description: Maintains and repairs aircraft engines, propulsion systems, and related components on Navy aircraft.

title: Aviation Electrician's Mate
description: Maintains and repairs electrical power systems, lighting, and associated equipment on Navy aircraft.

title: Aerographer's Mate
description: Collects and analyzes meteorological and oceanographic data to support fleet operations, flight safety, and tactical planning.

title: Naval Aircrewman Rescue Swimmer
description: Performs rescue swimmer and aircrewman duties aboard Navy helicopters, conducting search and rescue and combat search and rescue operations.

title: Aviation Structural Mechanic
description: Inspects, repairs, and maintains airframes, hydraulic systems, and structural components of Navy aircraft.

title: Aviation Structural Mechanic (Safety Equipment)
description: Maintains aircraft safety and survival equipment including ejection seats, parachutes, and emergency oxygen systems.

title: Aviation Ordnanceman
description: Stores, assembles, and loads aviation weapons, missiles, and ammunition on Navy aircraft.

title: Aviation Support Equipment Technician
description: Operates and maintains aviation ground support equipment used to service and test Navy aircraft systems.

title: Aviation Electronics Technician
description: Maintains and repairs avionics, navigation, and electronic warfare systems on Navy aircraft.

title: Naval Aircrewman Mechanical
description: Serves as an aircrewman on Navy helicopters, operating mechanical systems and performing search, rescue, and antisubmarine warfare missions.

title: Naval Aircrewman Operator
description: Operates sensors and tactical systems aboard Navy patrol aircraft and helicopters in antisubmarine and maritime patrol missions.

title: Naval Aircrewman Tactical Helicopter
description: Operates weapons systems and sensors aboard Romeo (MH-60R) helicopters conducting antisubmarine and antiship warfare missions.

title: Naval Aircrewman Helicopter
description: Serves as an aircrewman aboard Sierra (MH-60S) helicopters conducting combat search and rescue, vertical replenishment, and special operations support.

title: Naval Aircrewman Avionics
description: Maintains avionics and electronic systems while serving as an aircrewman on Navy patrol and reconnaissance aircraft.

title: Aviation Maintenance Administrationman
description: Manages administrative records, maintenance documentation, and data systems supporting Navy aviation maintenance operations.

title: Aircrew Survival Equipmentman
description: Maintains aircrew life support equipment including parachutes, survival gear, flight clothing, and oxygen systems.

title: Aviation Boatswain's Mate (Equipment)
description: Operates and maintains aircraft launch and recovery equipment on carriers, including catapults, arresting gear, and visual landing aids.

title: Aviation Boatswain's Mate (Fuels)
description: Handles and manages aviation fuel systems aboard carriers and naval air stations, ensuring safe fueling of aircraft.

title: Aviation Boatswain's Mate (Handling)
description: Directs aircraft movement, parking, and spotting on carrier flight decks and in hangars.

title: Boatswain's Mate
description: Supervises deck operations including ship handling, seamanship, small boat operations, and deck maintenance.

title: Damage Controlman
description: Maintains damage control equipment and trains crews in firefighting, flooding response, and nuclear, biological, and chemical defense.

title: Electrician's Mate
description: Operates and maintains shipboard electrical power generation and distribution systems.

title: Engineman
description: Operates and maintains diesel engines, gas turbines, and propulsion equipment on Navy ships and craft.

title: Electronics Technician
description: Maintains and repairs sophisticated electronic systems including radar, navigation, and communications equipment.

title: Fire Controlman
description: Operates and maintains advanced weapons direction and fire control systems including the Aegis combat system.

title: Gunner's Mate
description: Maintains and operates shipboard weapons systems including guns, missile launchers, and small arms.

title: Gas Turbine Systems Technician (Electrical)
description: Operates and maintains gas turbine propulsion plants and electrical systems on Navy surface ships.

title: Gas Turbine Systems Technician (Mechanical)
description: Operates and maintains the mechanical components of gas turbine propulsion and auxiliary systems.

title: Hull Maintenance Technician
description: Performs welding, pipefitting, and repair of ship hulls, plumbing, and structural components.

title: Interior Communications Electrician
description: Installs and maintains interior communications systems, gyroscopes, and navigation systems on Navy ships.

title: Machinist's Mate
description: Operates and maintains ship propulsion systems, auxiliary equipment, and outside machinery.

title: Machinist's Mate (Auxiliary/Submarine)
description: Operates and maintains auxiliary machinery, atmosphere control equipment, and propulsion systems on submarines.

title: Machinery Repairman
description: Fabricates and repairs precision metal parts for ship machinery using lathes, mills, and other machine tools.

title: Operations Specialist
description: Operates radar, navigation, and combat systems to track contacts and coordinate tactical operations aboard ships.

title: Quartermaster
description: Performs navigation duties including chart plotting, weather observation, and maintaining accurate records of the ship's position.

title: Sonar Technician (Surface)
description: Operates and maintains sonar systems used to detect and track submarines and underwater objects from surface ships.

title: Mineman
description: Assembles, deploys, and maintains naval mines and mine countermeasure systems.

title: Hospital Corpsman
description: Provides medical care and emergency treatment to sailors and Marines in clinical and combat environments.

title: Information Systems Technician
description: Operates and maintains Navy computer networks, telecommunications systems, and cybersecurity infrastructure.

title: Information Systems Technician (Submarines)
description: Operates and maintains computer networks, communications, and navigation systems aboard submarines.

title: Cryptologic Technician (Collection)
description: Collects and processes signals intelligence to support Navy and national-level intelligence operations.

title: Cryptologic Technician (Interpretive)
description: Translates and analyzes foreign language communications to produce actionable intelligence for military operations.

title: Cryptologic Technician (Maintenance)
description: Installs, operates, and maintains cryptologic systems and electronic intelligence collection equipment.

title: Cryptologic Technician (Networks)
description: Conducts offensive and defensive cyber operations and computer network exploitation for the Navy.

title: Cryptologic Technician (Technical)
description: Operates and monitors electronic sensor systems for signals intelligence collection and technical exploitation.

title: Cyber Warfare Technician
description: Conducts advanced cyber warfare operations including network exploitation, defense, and computer network attack missions.

title: Intelligence Specialist
description: Collects, analyzes, and disseminates intelligence information to support Navy operations and fleet commanders.

title: Yeoman
description: Performs administrative and clerical duties including correspondence, reports, and personnel records management.

title: Personnel Specialist
description: Manages personnel records, pay administration, and career counseling for Navy service members.

title: Logistics Specialist
description: Manages supply chain operations including procurement, inventory control, and financial accounting.

title: Logistics Specialist (Submarines)
description: Manages supply and storeroom operations, food service, and financial accounting aboard submarines.

title: Culinary Specialist
description: Plans menus, prepares food, and manages food service operations aboard ships and at shore installations.

title: Culinary Specialist (Submarines)
description: Prepares meals and manages food service and commissary operations aboard submarines.

title: Master-at-Arms
description: Provides law enforcement, force protection, and physical security for Navy installations and personnel.

title: Mass Communication Specialist
description: Produces visual media, journalism, and public affairs content to support Navy communication efforts.

title: Legalman
description: Provides legal assistance and administrative support for military justice and legal proceedings in the Navy.

title: Religious Program Specialist
description: Assists Navy chaplains in providing religious ministries, counseling, and humanitarian services to sailors.

title: Navy Counselor
description: Provides career counseling, enlisted community management, and retention support for Navy personnel.

title: Retail Services Specialist
description: Manages retail store operations aboard ships and at naval installations, including merchandise and financial transactions.

title: Musician
description: Performs music in Navy bands for ceremonies, concerts, funerals, and official functions.

title: Special Warfare Operator (Navy SEAL)
description: Conducts special operations including direct action, special reconnaissance, counter-terrorism, and unconventional warfare.

title: Special Warfare Boat Operator
description: Operates high-performance combat rubber raiding craft and patrol boats in support of special operations missions.

title: Navy Diver
description: Performs underwater salvage, ship repair, and combat diving operations using scuba and hard-hat diving equipment.

title: Explosive Ordnance Disposal
description: Locates, identifies, renders safe, and disposes of explosive ordnance including improvised explosive devices and unexploded ordnance.

title: Underwater Construction Team
description: Performs diving construction, repair, and inspection of piers, harbors, and underwater structures in support of fleet operations.

title: Builder
description: Constructs and repairs buildings, utilities, and facilities at naval installations using carpentry, masonry, and construction skills.

title: Construction Electrician
description: Installs and maintains electrical power, lighting, and communications systems at naval facilities and temporary bases.

title: Construction Mechanic
description: Maintains and repairs heavy construction equipment, vehicles, and power generation equipment for Seabee operations.

title: Engineering Aide
description: Performs surveying, drafting, and soil testing to support construction planning and project management for Navy Seabees.

title: Equipment Operator
description: Operates heavy construction equipment including bulldozers, cranes, and graders to build roads, airfields, and facilities.

title: Steelworker
description: Fabricates and erects structural steel, rigging, and concrete formwork for Navy Seabee construction projects.

title: Utilitiesman
description: Installs and maintains plumbing, heating, and refrigeration systems at naval shore facilities and forward-deployed bases.

title: Fire Control Technician (Submarines)
description: Operates and maintains weapons fire control systems and tactical data systems aboard submarines.

title: Missile Technician (Submarines)
description: Maintains and operates ballistic and cruise missile systems, including Trident missiles, aboard strategic submarines.

title: Sonar Technician (Submarines)
description: Operates and maintains sonar systems and fire control equipment on attack and ballistic missile submarines.

title: Submarine Electronics/Computer Field
description: Operates and maintains submarine electronic, combat, and computer systems under the Submarine Electronics/Computer Field program.

title: Electronics Technician (Navigation)
description: Operates and maintains navigation and electronic systems specifically aboard submarines and surface ships.

title: Robotics Warfare Specialist
description: Operates and maintains unmanned systems including aerial drones, surface, and underwater vehicles for Navy warfare operations.
